channel.title: readme.dm
channel.description: General notes and musings of Dylan Madisetti

item.title: 2026 06 30 please do not touch
item.description: <!-- Working notes / context gathered while researching this piece: - Museum: Bechtler Museum of Modern Art, Charlotte NC. - The David McGee show was the current exhibition on view. - The piece "that caught my eye" is from "Collection, Reframed: Jiha Moon" (Jun 13 - Nov 9, 2026), themes of representations of women / presence & absence. - Most likely artist: Hannele Ollakka (Finnish textile artist who works in gauzy, transparent fabrics + dyeing/serigraphy => "mixed media on silk gauze"). High confidence on artist; exact title/date awaiting the museum's reply. The blurry label's nationality read as "Finnish" (not "French"); the Korean association was the curator-artist Jiha Moon. -->

item.title: My Machine-Learning Instagram Bot: @rowdy_the_stuffed_dog
item.description:
My Machine-Learning Instagram Bot: @rowdy_the_stuffed_dog

I ran a finsta @rowdy_the_stuffed_dog for a few months in 2015, powered by the now more restricted Instagram API, a basic logistic regression model and some pettiness (you can DM for the story). Originally posted on my old Ghost blog in June 2015, this is re-published for posterity.

item.title: Project Setti
item.author: None
item.description: Over 2,000 sperm-whale sightings off of Dominica (2021–2026) from my dad's logbook, made into an interactive map and a Father's Day Retro.

item.title: Hello again
item.author: None
item.description: Another attempt at a blog, some introspection and a new domain (Dominica's TLD and, conveniently, my initials). Here we go webloggin'
